title: 10 Herbal Teas For Hormonal Imbalance
description: Ginkgo biloba teas contains flavonoids and terpenoids, which are active constituents that help balance hormones. The flavonoids, including quercetin and kaempferol, have antioxidant properties that reduce inflammation in the body, which can contribute to hormonal imbalance. Terpenoids, such as bilobalide, have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties that help regulate the body's response to hormonal changes.
